emails.subject: Nepool SS
emails.body: Nepool SS Joe, My name is Castlen Moore, and I work with Narsimha Misra on the EES desk. Anna Santucci and I are managing the Nepool hedging for EES, and Narsimha mentioned you might have a spreadsheet that could be helpful to us. He said he thought it was pulling info daily from the web on various fundamentals. Give me a call or email me when you have a minute. Anything on Nepool would be greatly appreciated by Anna and I. Thanks! Castlen 58528

emails.subject: RE: Nepool SS
emails.body: RE: Nepool SS Good Morning, Sorry, I didn't get back with you yesterday I had the day off. I would be happy to send you the info I look at during the day. let me know if it helps -Joe To: Stepenovitch, Joe

emails.subject: RE: Nepool SS
emails.body: Joe, I looked at the sheet, and I think it will be very helpful. When I open it however, its giving me an error message "error updating database." and then it freezes. Any ideas? Is it something I can update each day from the file you gave me, or do you have it saved in a directory that I could just open? I will be up on 31 at 10:30 and can swing by your desk if you will have a minute. Thanks for all your help! Castlen To: Moore, Castlen

emails.subject: RE: Nepool SS
emails.body: NO PROB...SEE YOU THEN To: Stepenovitch, Joe
